empty.message: No hosts yet. Add your first server to get started.

drawer.platformHint: May auto-update from the SSH banner on first connect.
drawer.noCredentialWarn: No password or key stored in the vault for this host. Enter one below before connecting.
drawer.passwordPlaceholderChange: Enter a new password to change
drawer.passwordPlaceholderVaultLater: Saved when vault is set up
drawer.privateKeyPlaceholderChange: Paste a new key to rotate
drawer.privateKeyPlaceholderVaultLater: Saved when vault is set up
drawer.noVaultHint: You can save host bookmarks without a vault. Passwords are not stored until you set up Vault — you will be asked when connecting.
drawer.keepCredentialHint: Leave blank to keep the stored password or key. The same record is used when connecting.

errors.vaultRequiredForSave: Set up the encrypted vault first to save a password or key (Vault in the top menu).
errors.passwordRequired: Enter the SSH password — connection requires saving it to the vault.
errors.privateKeyRequired: Enter the PEM private key — connection requires saving it to the vault.
errors.vaultRequiredForConnect: SSH requires a password or key. Set up and unlock the vault from the Vault screen first.
